prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为10554→9610→9109→13751→12510，2024年因新高考改革科类调整位次大幅后移至13751，2025年小幅回升至12510；近5年整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约12510名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年均为45人，2023年增至48人，2024年增至53人，2025年增至57人，2026年计划62人，连续多年扩招，2026年较2025年扩招约8.8%，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第55名，近年排名在49–55名之间波动，整体稳定；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件），2026年无直接声誉记录；抖音热度排名第102位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，南京农大此类专业录取位次靠前；农林类相关专业（植物保护、动物科学等）社会热度一般；黑龙江省2026年考生总数约167000人，较2025年（约172114人）减少约3%，竞争略有缓和，但扩招幅度更大；南京农业大学位于江苏省南京市，属东部发达地区，对黑龙江省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生计划逐年增加，2026年物理类计划62人，占比较小但持续增长。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12510名、2026年扩招约8.8%（位次后移压力）、本省考生总数略减约3%（位次前移动力）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招影响大于考生减少影响，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约13188名，区间12688–13688名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12688–13688名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（食品科学与工程类、农学、动物医学类等优势学科专业），一档专业（计算机、电子信息类）可冲刺但竞争激烈，三档专业（植物保护、动物科学、环境类等）作为保底选择。位次接近区间下限（12688名）时可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（13688名）时建议以二档稳妥专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were 10554 → 9610 → 9109 → 13751 → 12510 respectively. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and category adjustment, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 13751, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 12510. Over the past 5 years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating backward shift, with a baseline of approximately 12510 in 2025. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 45 in 2021–2022, increased to 48 in 2023, 53 in 2024, 57 in 2025, and planned 62 in 2026, with consecutive years of expansion. In 2026, the plan expands by about 8.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 55th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with fluctuations between 49th and 55th in recent years, overall stable. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident), with no direct reputation record in 2026. Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd (average), with low short video exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, totaling 5 A- and above disciplines, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, with admission rankings at Nanjing Agricultural University being relatively high. Agricultural and forestry-related majors (Plant Protection, Animal Science, etc.) have average social heat. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025 (approximately 172,114), slightly easing competition, but the expansion is larger. Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang examinees. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province has been increasing year by year, with 62 physics category slots in 2026, a small proportion but continuously growing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12510, the 2026 expansion of about 8.8% (pressure for ranking to shift backward), the slight decrease of about 3% in provincial examinees (momentum for ranking to shift forward), and stable university reputation, the expansion impact outweighs the examinee reduction impact. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13188, with a range of 12688–13688.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Automation)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Artificial Intelligence.

Tier 2 (Medium)

- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Animal Science
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Public Administration
- Logistics Engineering
- Information Resource Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12688–13688, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Agronomy, Veterinary Medicine, etc., which are advantageous disciplines). Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) can be targeted but are highly competitive, while Tier 3 majors (Plant Protection, Animal Science, Environmental Science, etc.) serve as safe choices. If the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (12688), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors; if near the upper limit (13688), focus on stable Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 1467 → 1563 → 1783 → 1936 → 1933, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 466 places in the past 5 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1933 places; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 8 in 2024, dropped back to 6 in 2025, and is planned to be 8 in 2026, an expansion of about 33.3% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 55th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, with no direct reputation record for 2026; Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd (average), with low exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; the university's liberal arts enrollment majors (Public Administration, Sociology, Business Administration, International Economics and Trade) have subject evaluations where Public Administration, Sociology, and Business Administration are not individually listed as A- or above, but the university's overall strength in agriculture and forestry disciplines is prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended, while Business Administration is divided and watched; the total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition, but the expansion rate (33.3%) is far greater than the decrease in examinees; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an economically developed eastern region, with some cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts examinees in Heilongjiang; the history category enrollment plan increased from 6 to 8 students, but the absolute number remains small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1933, a significant expansion of about 33.3% in 2026 (substantial pressure for ranking backward), and a slight decrease of about 3% in the total number of provincial examinees (limited momentum for ranking forward), the impact of expansion far outweighs the decrease in examinees. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be significantly lower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2350, with a range of 1927–2773.

- International Economics and Trade.

When the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (1927), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; when the ranking is near the upper limit (2773), it is advisable to prioritize stable Tier 3 majors.
